{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2b392dbe",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Multi-objective shape optimisation\n",
    "\n",
    "A small evolutionary run over an elliptical mid-cell: each candidate is tuned to a target frequency, then ranked by two conflicting objectives — peak surface **electric** field and peak surface **magnetic** field (both normalised to the accelerating gradient). The result is a Pareto front of the best trade-offs.\n",
    "\n",
    "The optimisation template is whatever cavity you add to the study, so the same workflow optimises any model (pillbox, RF-gun, spline, ...).\n",
    "\n",
    "See the [optimisation guide](../../optimisation). Kept tiny (a handful of candidates, one generation) so it runs in a couple of minutes."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "85bed08e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:08:18.571129Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:08:18.570945Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.140969Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.140123Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import tempfile\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from cavsim2d import Study, EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "440ecf54",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. The study and the search space\n",
    "\n",
    "`bounds` are the swept design variables; the tuned handle (`Req`, via `cell_type`) is adjusted separately to keep every candidate on frequency, so it is *not* one of the bounds."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "63d55ac8",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.143931Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.143652Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.154440Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.153763Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "cavs = Study(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'opt'))\n",
    "midcell = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.7, 103.353]\n",
    "cavs.add_cavity([EllipticalCavity(1, midcell, midcell, midcell, beampipe='none')], ['TESLA'])\n",
    "\n",
    "config = {\n",
    "    'initial_points': 4,\n",
    "    'no_of_generation': 1,\n",
    "    'method': {'LHS': {'seed': 5}},\n",
    "    'bounds': {'A': [40, 46], 'B': [40, 46], 'a': [10, 14], 'b': [17, 21]},\n",
    "    'objectives': [['min', 'monopole:Epk/Eacc []'],\n",
    "                   ['min', 'monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]']],\n",
    "    'tune_config': {\n",
    "        'freqs': 1300.0,\n",
    "        'cell_type': {'mid-cell': 'Req'},\n",
    "        'processes': 1,\n",
    "        'eigenmode_config': {'n_cells': 1, 'processes': 1, 'boundary_conditions': 'mm'},\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    'mutation_factor': 4, 'crossover_factor': 4, 'elites_for_crossover': 2,\n",
    "    'chaos_factor': 2, 'weights': [1, 1],\n",
    "}"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "4afb2e2c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. Run the optimisation"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "cc6910c5",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.156652Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:08:20.156509Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:09:18.944135Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:09:18.943746Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\r",
      "  0%|          | 0/1 [00:00<?, ?it/s]"
     ]
    },
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\r",
      "100%|██████████| 1/1 [00:58<00:00, 58.59s/it]"
     ]
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "evaluated candidates: 4\n",
      "Pareto-front size:    2\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cavs.run_optimisation(config)\n",
    "opt = cavs.optimisation\n",
    "print(f'evaluated candidates: {len(opt.history)}')\n",
    "print(f'Pareto-front size:    {len(opt.pareto)}')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a04ac679",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. The Pareto front\n",
    "\n",
    "Each point is a candidate in objective space; the front is the set of non-dominated trade-offs (lowering one peak field costs the other)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "bd7a2030",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:09:18.945670Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:09:18.945514Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:09:19.029052Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:09:19.028588Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "(<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>,\n",
       " array([[<Axes: xlabel='monopole:Epk/Eacc []', ylabel='monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]'>]],\n",
       "       dtype=object))"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "opt.plot_pareto(kind='scatter', normalise=False)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "06f351f9",

  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "6f655f88",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Where to go next\n",
    "\n",
    "- Add more generations (`no_of_generation`) and candidates (`initial_points`) for a real run.\n",
    "- Swap the template cavity for a `Pillbox`, `RFGun` or `SplineCavity` and give bounds in that model's own variables — the workflow is identical."
   ]
  }
 ],
